calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michele Pense, 415-595-9034, appearing on her own bhalf as Pro Per Defendant;
No other appearance.

The Court informs defendant Michele Pense, that the sheriff has notifed the Court that the claim of exemption was submitted untimely.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Off calendar. The Sheriff instructed the court that the opposition to the claim of exemption was untimely.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Off Calendar
